PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cotton-print.com/" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 15 } catch { $r1 = $_.Exception.Response }; "cotton-print.com:"; if \($r1\) { "  Status: $\($r1.StatusCode\)"; "  Location: $\($r1.Headers.Location\)" }; "---"; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.cotton-print.com/" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -TimeoutSec 15 } catch { $r2 = $_.Exception.Response }; "www.cotton-print.com:"; if \($r2\) { "  Status: $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; "  Location: $\($r2.Headers.Location\)" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://www.cotton-print.com/?nocache=$\(Get-Random\)" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "ContentLength: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; "Title: $\(\(\($r.Content -split "`n"\) | Select-String -Pattern '<title>' | Select-Object -First 1\).Line.Trim\(\)\)")
